title: Components Manifest
description: Schema for components.json — atomic component layer in the split-architecture design system (design.md + components.json + patterns.json + ui.json). Components reference design.md semantic tokens via {design.semantic.*} brace syntax. Direction rule: components may only reference design (downward); references to patterns or ui are an audit error.

schema.description: Path or URL to this schema

scope.description: Must be 'components-only' — this file defines components and nothing else. Tokens live in design.md; compositions live in patterns.json/ui.json.

depends_on.description: Files this manifest depends on. Audit resolves refs against these.

dtcg_version.description: Pinned DTCG (Design Tokens Community Group) spec version. Token alias syntax {group.token} aligns with this spec.

version.description: SemVer of this components manifest. Per-skill bump — independent of library-wide version.

atom.description: Atomic components — smallest UI primitives (button, input, badge, icon). Cannot compose other atoms.

molecule.description: Molecules — compositions of atoms (form-field, search-bar, card-header). Phase 3+. May be empty in Phase 1A.

organism.description: Organisms — larger composed blocks (data-table, nav-bar, hero). Phase 3+. May be empty in Phase 1A.

Ref.description: Cross-file reference using brace syntax. Format: {file.path.to.thing}. Direction must be downward: ui→patterns→components→design.

DiffSpec.description: Diff-only override from base. Agent merges base + variant + size + state (last-write-wins). Open shape: any field at base level may be overridden — typically tokens, classes, render.role, a11y.

tokens.description: Token overrides — only the vars that change from base.

classes.description: Classes appended to (or replacing) base classes. Convention: prefix with modifier class(es).

id.description: Component id in kebab-case. Must match the key in atom/molecule/organism.

summary.description: Short intent for the agent — what this component is for and when to reach for it.

composes.description: Refs to child components this composition includes. Atoms typically omit this. Molecules/organisms reference atoms (and molecules for organisms).

role.description: ARIA role when needed (omit if tag already conveys role).

classes.description: Base CSS classes. Follows BEM-ish convention (block, block--mod, block__el).

html_template.description: Relative path to the HTML template file (Mustache/Handlebars-style).

tokens.description: Component-tier CSS custom properties mapped to design.md semantic refs. Keys are CSS var names; values are {design.semantic.*} refs (downward only).

variants.description: Variant-level diffs from base (e.g. primary, secondary, ghost). Merge order: base → variant → size → state.

variant-extensions.description: Governed escape valve for one-off variants outside the canonical set (e.g. a campaign-specific button color). Each extension MUST inherit from a canonical variant via `extends` and declare `reason` + `expires` so it doesn't silently accumulate — design-md-audit flags any entry past its `expires` date as Major ("promote to canonical or remove"). Do not use this for variants meant to be permanent; add those to the canonical `variants` set instead.

reason.description: Why this one-off variant exists — who asked, what for.
examples: Songkran campaign 2026 — marketing requested a green CTA for the promo banner only

expires.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) after which design-md-audit flags this extension for review.

extends.description: Canonical variant name this one-off is based on (must exist in `variants`, or be the atom's base if it equals the atom id's implicit default).

tokens.description: Diff-only token overrides on top of the extended variant.

sizes.description: Size-level diffs from base (e.g. sm, md, lg). Merge order: base → variant → size → state.

states.description: State-level diffs from base (e.g. hover, focus, active, disabled, loading). Merge order: base → variant → size → state.

role.description: Expected ARIA role (informational; render.role is authoritative if both present).

required_attrs.description: Attributes the component must render (e.g. aria-label, aria-pressed).

contrast_pair.description: Token pair the audit should verify against WCAG contrast.

min_ratio.description: Minimum required ratio. Default 4.5 (WCAG AA body); use 3 for large text/UI.
